Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Is ISKCON controlled by the masons?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2008-07-31 · 3 answers
I heard some devotees believe this.

Please post signs or evidence to this.
user [192] · 2008-08-02
...dont you mean " is Iskcon controlled by anyone? ".But I understand your point,there seems to be no rhyme nor reason to what goes on these days.
user [75] · 2008-08-02
while it (ISKCON being controlled by the bilderbergers, or some other such outfit) would add a certain romantic touch to the otherwise boring reality, and give one a (more or less) concrete enemy to fight against, im afraid its just good ol lust, greed, envy, and material attachment in those who make up ISKCON, i.e., all of us, including our leaders.

i doubt if people would be clever enough to maintain any secret plot thats ruling the world, or ISKCON, for an extended period of time. the big conspircacy is that almost all are heavily influenced by their lower natures and act on that level. this makes it look as if they were trying to achieve some common, predetermined goal. in reality that goal is just to get influence, advantages, and perks--finally to become god, of course, but most dont realize that.
user [19] · 2008-08-03
well, of course the masons are controlled by lust etc which is controlled by kali so they are marionettes anyway. but i say a few posts on this sites with claims that suggested that they may have indeed infiltrated iskcon.
